issue_summary: SimpleRegression needs the ability to suppress the intercept
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns the * standard error of the intercept estimate, * usually denoted s(b0). *

* If there are fewer that three observations in the * model, or if there is no variation in x, this returns * Double.NaN.

* * @return standard error associated with intercept estimate */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns the * standard error of the intercept estimate, * usually denoted s(b0). *

* If there are fewer that three observations in the * model, or if there is no variation in x, this returns * Double.NaN.

Additionally, a Double.NaN is * returned when the intercept is constrained to be zero * * @return standard error associated with intercept estimate */
